tasks.title: Implement proper Supabase auth foundation with email/password + magic link, shared session handling, and a /login route
tasks.notes: Completed on 2026-03-13. Auth foundation shipped live with email/password + magic link, protected routes, and production verification on tristdrum.com.

tasks.title: Add protected private routes for the owner dashboard and existing sensitive admin surfaces
tasks.notes: Completed on 2026-03-13. Dashboard, Task Pulse, and artwork admin are now behind auth/admin gating.

tasks.title: Harden Supabase authorization and RLS for artworks plus future private dashboard data
tasks.notes: Completed on 2026-03-13. Added `site_admins` auth helpers/bootstrap path and tightened artwork write access.

tasks.title: Ship the first private dashboard shell for active projects, open loops, and assistant-tracked work
tasks.notes: Completed on 2026-03-13. Initial private dashboard shell is live and ready for expansion.

tasks.title: Document required Supabase project settings, migration/deploy steps, and local env setup for hosted auth
tasks.notes: Completed on 2026-03-13. Auth setup and deployment notes were added to repo docs during the rollout.

tasks.title: Add tests or smoke checks for auth-critical flows and verify build/lint still pass
tasks.notes: Completed on 2026-03-13. Lint, tests, and build passed after the auth rollout.

tasks.title: Turn the Ralph Loops proposal into a repo-native implementation plan that Ralph can execute against
tasks.notes: Completed on 2026-03-13. Canonical plan now lives in `docs/RALPH_LOOPS_PLAN.md` and locks in the source-of-truth, snapshot, schema, automation, security, and rollout direction.

tasks.title: Define the Ralph Loops snapshot JSON contract and runtime validation layer
tasks.notes: Top priority now is Ralph Loops. Add a real JSON schema plus shared parser/validator so exporter and UI consume one canonical project snapshot shape only. Keep it DRY and production-minded.

tasks.title: Add Supabase migration for Ralph Loops projection tables, constraints, and owner-only RLS
tasks.notes: Create the first read-model tables for `ralph_projects_current`, `ralph_project_snapshots_history`, and `ralph_sync_runs`. Supabase is the site-facing projection only, not the canonical source.

tasks.title: Implement the Ralph Loops exporter that projects local Ralph state into Supabase with hash-aware writes
tasks.notes: Read local Ralph config/runtime/task sources, build validated snapshots, upsert current rows, append history only on change, and record sync-run observability.

tasks.title: Add a 5-minute Ralph Loops sync automation with durable logs and failure visibility
tasks.notes: Wire the exporter into a reliable local automation path that runs every 5 minutes to start. Keep per-run logs, explicit status, and no dropped loops.

tasks.title: Build the owner-only Ralph Loops dashboard summary page with project cards and sync health
tasks.notes: Add `/dashboard/ralph-loops` using the Supabase projection. Show all projects, state, current item, usage multiplier, quick links, and last-sync/sync-health summary.

tasks.title: Add Ralph Loops project detail pages with run history and snapshot inspection
tasks.notes: After the summary page works, add `/dashboard/ralph-loops/:projectId` with deeper run history, backlog state, and raw snapshot visibility.

tasks.title: Add tests, docs, and rollout verification for the Ralph Loops pipeline
tasks.notes: Finish with schema/exporter/UI tests, operator docs, and rollout verification so the loop is understandable and safe to evolve.
